creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
fyi ekg2 github is https://github.com/ekg2/ekg2 

Regarding maintaining, I still use polish/ekg and from what I can see it does not need any attention for quite some time already, thought I don't know if I could spare any if it would prove otherwise.

I do not use ekg2, only have ever used it if for some reason ekg would not work/compile (long time ago).
